lever.description: Route tail-free, explicit-out-axes-free nonzero-axis vmap through BatchTrace only when the root Jaxpr is effect-free and all equations are elementwise primitives with existing axis-aware batching rules.

after.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-dispatch-axis1-bench-pass29 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- dispatch_latency/vmap/rank2_add_one_in_axes_1 --sample-size 100 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1

isomorphism_proof.mapped_axis_order: Preserved: BatchTrace carries resolved batch_dim=1, then moves that dimension to axis 0, matching loop-and-stack index order over source axis 1.
isomorphism_proof.row_major_element_order: Preserved by the existing transpose/move_batch_dim_to_front path; golden output remains [2,5,3,6,4,7] for input shape [2,3].
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: No new arithmetic implementation is introduced; elementwise primitives still execute through existing fj-lax evaluation, and FP operand order is unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.error_behavior: Composed transforms, explicit vmap_out_axes, effects, sub-jaxprs, and non-elementwise primitives remain on the existing loop-and-stack fallback.
